title: Cosy Critters & Creepy Crawlies [Neo]
description: Adds adorable and abstruse atmospheric animals, accentuating aesthetics.
body:
Adds adorable and abstruse atmospheric animals, accentuating aesthetics.

A **client** mod for **NeoForge**. Port of the original [Fabric](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/cosy-critters) version.

Support in my [Discord](https://discord.gg/m4EHeRjfZ9) !

### Birds

Will fly down and perch on **leaves**, **walls**, and **fences**, scattering when disturbed.

![](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/description/1182393/description_d359fdf7-3715-4c33-8a1e-921720522159.gif)

### Tiny Spiders

Appear from within **cobwebs**, crawling out along the walls, floors, and ceilings.

![](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/description/1182393/description_84d680ca-1253-43d3-87ef-60dc51f51afc.gif)

### Moths

Attracted to lights. Will surround any **torch** or **lantern** left exposed to the sky.

![](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/description/1182393/description_af4217f0-a748-4b05-a02f-b8b409af2f8b.gif)

### The Hat Man

???

![](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/description/1182393/description_74f67c1a-85b7-48e8-9197-84446d63a0d5.png)
